description: WorktreeOS AI skills catalog: agent-facing playbooks for operating the wos CLI.

skills.name: wos-cli
skills.description: General orientation for AI agents using the wos CLI: the first-run setup wizard (wos init) and config gate, command map, global options, and daemon-backed behavior.

skills.name: wos-service-lifecycle
skills.description: Start and stop wos-managed services: wos up, wos up -d, selective startup, forced refresh, and wos down.

skills.name: wos-service-status
skills.description: Inspect worktree deployment state and wait for readiness using wos status and wos wait --timeout.

skills.name: wos-daemon
skills.description: Manage the local wos daemon: start, stop, restart, and foreground diagnostics for the daemon control plane.

skills.name: wos-web-ui
skills.description: Open or print the wos web UI URL with wos web and wos web --no-open, including worktree detail URLs.

skills.name: wos-worktree
skills.description: Use worktree-scoped commands safely, including the global --cwd option and wos worktree remove [--force].

skills.name: wos-troubleshooting
skills.description: Diagnose common wos CLI failures in a structured order before retrying or escalating.

skills.name: wos-config
skills.description: Understand the deploy-config concepts an agent needs to operate the CLI: modes, services, ports, healthchecks, and clone volumes.
